title: Boshoff brothers make waves
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Early mornings, long training...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Early mornings, long training sessions and countless laps in the pool are paying off for Knysna brothers Keanu (14) and Mickayle (13) Boshoff, who have enjoyed a standout season in competitive swimming, collecting medals and setting personal bests across the Western Cape.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Early mornings, long training sessions and countless laps in the pool are paying off for Knysna brothers Keanu (14) and Mickayle (13) Boshoff, who have enjoyed a standout season in competitive swimming, collecting medals and setting personal bests across the Western Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Competing at the Eden Long Course Championships in Oudtshoorn in November 2025, Keanu delivered a dominant performance, finishing the meet with seven gold and three bronze medals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His momentum continued at the Western Cape Long Course A Championships in Malmesbury in December, where he raced against the fastest swimmers in the province, claiming gold in the 100m freestyle, silver in the 50m freestyle, and bronze medals in both the 50m and 100m butterfly.","html":"His momentum continued at the Western Cape Long Course A Championships in Malmesbury in December, where he raced against the fastest swimmers in the province, claiming gold in the 100m freestyle, silver in the 50m freestyle, and bronze medals in both the 50m and 100m butterfly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His consistent performances earned him selection to the Eden team for the Nelson Mandela Bay Aquatics Inter-District Prestige Championships in January this year.","html":"His consistent performances earned him selection to the Eden team for the Nelson Mandela Bay Aquatics Inter-District Prestige Championships in January this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Competing against top district teams, Keanu added one gold, one silver and three bronze medals to his season tally.","html":"Competing against top district teams, Keanu added one gold, one silver and three bronze medals to his season tally."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His younger brother Mickayle has also enjoyed a breakthrough year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the Eden Aquatics Long Course Championships, he won gold in the 200m butterfly, silver in the 400m freestyle, and bronze medals in the 100m butterfly and 200m freestyle.","html":"At the Eden Aquatics Long Course Championships, he won gold in the 200m butterfly, silver in the 400m freestyle, and bronze medals in the 100m butterfly and 200m freestyle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the Western Cape Long Course Championships in Malmesbury, he continued his strong form, winning bronze medals in the 400m freestyle and 100m butterfly before clinching gold in the 200m butterfly.","html":"At the Western Cape Long Course Championships in Malmesbury, he continued his strong form, winning bronze medals in the 400m freestyle and 100m butterfly before clinching gold in the 200m butterfly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That victory officially crowned Mickayle as the fastest 13-year-old 200m butterfly swimmer in the Western Cape.","html":"That victory officially crowned Mickayle as the fastest 13-year-old 200m butterfly swimmer in the Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite the medal haul, Keanu said that the time and effort you put in at the pool matter more than the medals.","html":"Despite the medal haul, Keanu said that the time and effort you put in at the pool matter more than the medals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A family affair","html":"A family affair"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Behind the brothers' success is a familiar figure on poolside: their father, Francois Boshoff, who is their coach. A former competitive swimmer himself, Francois earned a swimming scholarship to the University of Nebraska before returning to South Africa to pursue a coaching career.","html":"Behind the brothers' success is a familiar figure on poolside: their father, Francois Boshoff, who is their coach. A former competitive swimmer himself, Francois earned a swimming scholarship to the University of Nebraska before returning to South Africa to pursue a coaching career."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Balancing the dual roles has not always been easy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"He's really hard on me, and some-times it's difficult because he's my dad,\" said Mickayle.","html":"\"He's really hard on me, and some-times it's difficult because he's my dad,\" said Mickayle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Keanu, having his dad as a coach is a strength. \"My dad is one of the greatest coaches, and as a father he's even better. I look up to him as both a father and a coach,\" he said.","html":"For Keanu, having his dad as a coach is a strength. \"My dad is one of the greatest coaches, and as a father he's even better. I look up to him as both a father and a coach,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Francois, the line between disci-pline and parenting is one he constantly navigates. \"It's the hardest thing I've ever done,\" he said. \"I always try to be their dad first.\"","html":"For Francois, the line between disci-pline and parenting is one he constantly navigates. \"It's the hardest thing I've ever done,\" he said. \"I always try to be their dad first.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that while he always believed in his sons' potential, he needed to see whether they were willing to put in the work. \"Their performances at the Western Cape championships showed they can step up on their own.\"","html":"He added that while he always believed in his sons' potential, he needed to see whether they were willing to put in the work. \"Their performances at the Western Cape championships showed they can step up on their own.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Big dreams from a small town","html":"Big dreams from a small town"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both boys train and compete for Knysna Aquatics. Francois acknow-ledges the challenges of coming from a smaller town where high-level competitions are limited, but says he remains confident in his training programme.","html":"Both boys train and compete for Knysna Aquatics. Francois acknow-ledges the challenges of coming from a smaller town where high-level competitions are limited, but says he remains confident in his training programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking ahead, both brothers hope their performances will open doors to university scholarships in the United States. With two district league galas still to come, their immediate focus is the South African National Junior Championships in Gqeberha in March.","html":"Looking ahead, both brothers hope their performances will open doors to university scholarships in the United States. With two district league galas still to come, their immediate focus is the South African National Junior Championships in Gqeberha in March."}]
